title: Select the Columns
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. The reporting team needs a clean list of users. Write a query that returns the `id`, `name` and `email` columns from the `users` table — and only those columns (no `SELECT *`).
objectives: Use SELECT with the three named columns
Read from the users table with FROM
hints: List the columns explicitly after SELECT, separated by commas.
Every column query needs a FROM clause naming the table.

files.content:
-- TODO: return only the id, name and the contact address columns from the right table
SELECT *;

parseRules.failMessage: Add a FROM clause naming the table.
